scripts.generate: pnpm exec node ../../packages/psl/dist/cli.js emit schema.psl > .prisma/schema.json && pnpm exec node -e "const { emitSchemaAndTypes } = require('../../packages/schema-emitter/dist/index.js'); const fs = require('fs'); const ast = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.prisma/schema.json', 'utf-8')); const { types } = emitSchemaAndTypes(ast); fs.writeFileSync('.prisma/schema.d.ts', types);"
